settings.title: Master a New Dimension
settings.description: The 310 APEX serves as an open-wheel hub, featuring CONSPIT's exclusive 2.99-inch built-in LCD display and compatibility with multiple rim designs. Its full-metal construction delivers premium craftsmanship, combined with innovative control features that elevate entry-level sim racing to new heights.

settings.title: Full Aluminum Alloy Structure - Robust Yet Lightweight
settings.description: The front and rear housings are precision-crafted from die-cast aluminum alloy, achieving optimal weight reduction, rigidity, and vibration damping. Enhanced acoustic and haptic feedback ensures an immersive driving experience.

settings.title: 3D Front Panel - Where Design Meets Function
settings.description: Leveraging the flexibility of aluminum alloy casting, the 310 APEX features a contoured 3D front panel that follows CONSPIT’s hardware ecosystem design language. Its ergonomic layout provides intuitive access to controls for superior handling.

settings.title: Standard Synthetic Leather Rim - Comfort & Durability
settings.description: Made from wear-resistant eco-friendly microfiber, the rim features seamless stitching at the grip zones, accented with purple stitching and a center alignment marker for long-lasting comfort and precision.

settings.title: Pro-Level Controls - 104 Fully Customizable Inputs
settings.description: Equipped with encoder remapping, the wheel supports up to 104 independent inputs, meeting the demands of competitive sim racing. Future firmware updates will expand functionality, including rotary macro mapping.

settings.title: 8 Customizable RGB Buttons - Tactile & Responsive
settings.description: With 500g actuation force and short-throw feedback, these buttons deliver crisp inputs. Full RGB lighting works with CONSPIT Link 2.0 and SimHub for dynamic telemetry visualization.

settings.title: 2 Programmable Encoder Dials - Versatile Input Options
settings.description: Strategically placed for thumb operation, each dial supports 24 input combinations via remapping, offering extensive in-car adjustment flexibility.

settings.title: 2 Funky Switches - Multi-Function Control
settings.description: A sim racing essential, each physical button can be assigned up to 7 different commands for efficient control.

settings.title: Dual-Mode Rotary Encoders - Incremental & Absolute
settings.description: Two 12-step rotary knobs allow seamless switching between incremental (+/-) and absolute positioning modes via software. Each step features RGB backlighting for clear visibility.

settings.title: Encoder Remapping (Patent Pending)
settings.description:
With a simple turn of the function dial, users can instantly remap the two encoders for difffferent in-game functions. 

Example: 
- Position 3: Encoder 1 = TC1, Encoder 2 = TC2
- Position 4: Encoder 1 = Brake Bias, Encoder 2 = ABS

settings.title: 2.99" Built-In LCD Display - Real-Time Telemetry
settings.description: CONSPIT’s self-developed screen supports 7 customizable dash pages for critical racing data, with more layouts coming via updates.

settings.title: Advanced Lighting System - 41 Fully Customizable LEDs
settings.description: Includes 8 button backlights, 9 RPM LEDs, and 24 rotary encoder position lights—all programmable via SimHub for race and telemetry feedback.

settings.title: Magnetic Hall-Effect Paddle Shifters - Adjustable Resistance
settings.description: Positioned for optimal reach, the shifters offer two resistance levels (660gf, 900gf) with precise magnetic actuation for crisp gear changes.

settings.title: Standard Dual Clutch Paddles
settings.description: Fine-tuned with expertise, these paddles support various types of clutch controls for flawless race starts.

settings.title: Quick-Con Adapter with Independent USB Connection
settings.description:
- Standard 70mm PCD adapter, ensuring broad compatibility with various options.

- Heavy-duty quick connector ensures stable, reliable connections.

- Comes with a detachable coiled cable featuring a direct USB connection.
